description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named linters that runs on push to main and on pull requests to main. The workflow should concurrently run three jobs: rubocop, clang_format, and clang_static_analyzer, each on an ubuntu-24.04 environment, and cancel any in-progress runs. The rubocop job should set up Ruby 3.3, install dependencies with bundle install, and run rubocop. The clang_format job should install clang-format-18, and run clang-format checks. The clang_static_analyzer job should set up Ruby 3.3, install clang-18 and clang-tools-18, use ccache, run scan build, and upload a report on failure.
